data.content: Shipment review passed. Verified: merge commit c01008a4d882 and implementation commit d6ea6656529b are on main HEAD. CI run 23745418873 green (lint, tests, coverage, build). All 6 acceptance criteria met: localStorage persistence on input change, restore on reopen, Clear button in form actions, form reset on Clear, draft cleared on Done/CreateMore, no new dependencies. Previously flagged issues (tsc dotAll regex, unrelated settings-pools changes) are resolved — no unrelated files in final diff. tsc --noEmit clean, 204 test files / 2348 tests passing locally.
